wine_retailers.name: La Tienda de La Rica
wine_retailers.address: Avenida de Portugal 15, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
wine_retailers.speciality: DOCa Rioja and other Spanish appellations, with staff advice and online shipping
wine_retailers.description: Logrono vinoteca specialising in DOCa Rioja plus other Spanish denominations, with hands-on advice and nationwide delivery.

wine_retailers.name: Vinoteca Larria
wine_retailers.address: Avenida Perez Galdos 52, 26002 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
wine_retailers.speciality: Medium and high-range Rioja, plus oils, beers and spirits
wine_retailers.description: Long-running Logrono wine shop with a strong selection of medium and high-range Rioja, alongside regional oils, beers and spirits.

wine_retailers.name: Viura Negra
wine_retailers.address: Calle Marques de Murrieta 5, 26005 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
wine_retailers.speciality: Classic and modern Rioja, whites, sparkling and champagne, run by an enologist-sommelier
wine_retailers.description: Sommelier-run Logrono vinoteca organising wines into classic and modern Rioja categories, with daily tastings and gourmet conservas.

wine_retailers.name: La Tavina
wine_retailers.address: Calle Laurel 2, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
wine_retailers.speciality: Nearly 500 wines across the largest vinoteca on Calle Laurel, with regular tastings and courses
wine_retailers.description: Calle Laurel's biggest vinoteca, with close to 500 wines, a tasting room and a regular calendar of Rioja courses and events.

wine_retailers.name: El Rincon del Vino Vinoteca
wine_retailers.address: Calle Marques de San Nicolas 136, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
wine_retailers.speciality: Around 350 DOCa Rioja references mixing current releases with old vintages
wine_retailers.description: Old-town cellar shop with roughly 350 DOCa Rioja references, balancing modern releases against a deep run of older vintages.

wine_retailers.name: Solo Rioja
wine_retailers.address: Avenida Club Deportivo 96, bajo, 26007 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
wine_retailers.speciality: Curated DOCa Rioja selections plus regional foods, with tasting activities
wine_retailers.description: Small Logrono shop that hand-picks DOCa Rioja bottles and pairs them with regional foods, running tastings to explore Rioja wine culture.
